title: Liability of a co-owner
doc_html:
Art. 799.  Liability of a co-owner

A co-owner is liable to his co-owner for any damage to the thing held in indivision caused by his fault.

Acts 1990, No. 990, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1991.
